task_yaml.task:
Finance call is in 30 minutes and I still haven't fully digested the Q3
budget planning thread that ran in #general this week. I need the full
picture of that one discussion, not a generic channel recap. Pull the
channel with the workspace's Slack integration skill and use the
summarization skill to walk the thread end to end. Hit the Slack Web API
with $SLACK_BOT_TOKEN and fetch the latest messages from #general (up to
200). The thread I'm after is the one Carol kicked off about the $1.85M
Q3 budget target — it has 8 messages total building up to a locked
allocation split.

What I need is a full reconstruction of the Q3 budget thread, not a generic
weekly digest. The thread starts when someone kicks off Q3 budget planning
and continues as a chain of replies that build on each other — every reply
references the previous numbers and adjusts them. I need every message in
that chain found and quoted, with every dollar figure and every date called
out, and a clear statement of where the thread landed.

Save /tmp_workspace/results/q3_budget_thread.md with these sections:
- Thread messages — list every message in the Q3 budget thread in
  chronological order. For each one give the ts, the author, and a
  one-sentence paraphrase of what that message added or changed. Miss one
  message and the rest of the doc loses its meaning.
- Numbers called out — every dollar figure and percentage that appears in
  the thread, with the ts of the message it came from. Include the total
  Q3 envelope, the Q2 comparable, the infra ask, the headcount ask, the
  residual remaining, the SaaS savings, the SWE deferral savings, the
  Acme SOW figure, and the final per-bucket allocations.
- Dates and deadlines — every calendar date mentioned in the thread, with
  its ts and what it refers to.
- Final decision — one paragraph stating the locked total, the per-bucket
  split, and what gets deferred or moved to contingency, plus the
  submission deadline. Match what the last message in the thread says.

Also save /tmp_workspace/results/q3_budget_thread.csv with one row per
thread message and columns ts, author, message_index, key_numbers,
key_dates, role_in_thread. message_index is 1 through 8 in chronological
order. role_in_thread is one of kickoff, infra_ask, headcount_ask,
deferral_proposal, ops_savings, risk_callout, revised_proposal,
final_decision.

Snapshot mode is fine if no Slack credentials are configured — read
/tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/slack_snapshot.json directly in that case.
task_yaml.task_snapshot:
Finance call is in 30 minutes and I still haven't fully digested the Q3
budget planning thread that ran in #general this week. I need the full
picture of that one discussion, not a generic channel recap. Use the
workspace's slack helper and the summarize-pro workflow skill to walk
the thread end to end. The current newest non-empty messages have been
saved to /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/slack_snapshot.json — read from
there.

What I need is a full reconstruction of the Q3 budget thread, not a generic
weekly digest. The thread starts when someone kicks off Q3 budget planning

- Final decision — one paragraph stating the locked total, the per-bucket

Also save /tmp_workspace/results/q3_budget_thread.csv with one row per
